title: The Gang Makes Paddy's Great Again

jokes.text: when I first walked in, there were two dogs fighting. They were, like, strays or something that had wandered in? No one noticed.
jokes.setup: Describing how the bar has 'evolved' and become more welcoming
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of literal dog fights happening in the bar with no one caring
jokes.explanation: Great absurdist humor - the casual delivery of something so outrageous makes it funnier

dialogue.line: when I first walked in, there were two dogs fighting. They were, like, strays or something that had wandered in? No one noticed.

jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Frank would absolutely pull a gun, and the 'not racial' clarification is darkly hilarious

dialogue.line: the first time I met Frank, he pulled a gun on me. Misunderstanding. Not racial.

tmdb_overview: Meet Cindy, the new, ethnically diverse female member of the gang who can successfully pull off scams. Everything is working until Mac introduces a new member: a life-like sex doll that looks exactly like Dennis.
